summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs plus linked canonical/context refs. The remaining non-security candidate PRs have passing relevant checks and useful contributor work, but none has the complete merge preflight required for a merge recommendation: mergeability is unknown and there is no populated proof of a clean Codex /review with addressed findings. No GitHub mutations are planned because the job is plan mode and comment/close/label actions are blocked.
